> [!TIP]
> Before submitting a pull request, please read our **[Contributing Guidelines](https://github.com/chumachun/academy-ng-in-action/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md)** and review the **[branching & rebasing strategy](https://github.com/chumachun/academy-ng-in-action/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md#-branching--rebasing-strategy)**.

## 📝 Description

Briefly describe the change and which issue it addresses.

Fixes # (issue)

## 🎯 Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ New feature
- [ ] 📖 Documentation update
- [ ] 🛠️ Refactor / Tooling / Configuration
- [ ] ⚠️ Security fix

## 🌳 Target Branch

- [ ] **main** — General improvements (bug fixes, UI, tooling)
- [ ] **solution/basic** — Basic course solutions content
- [ ] **solution/advanced** — Advanced course solutions content

> **Cascading rebase note:** Changes targeting `main` propagate → `solution/basic` → `solution/advanced`; targeting `solution/basic` propagate → `solution/advanced`. Maintainers handle these rebases.

## ✅ Definition of Done

- [ ] Code compiles and builds without errors.
- [ ] CI/CD pipeline passes (lint, test, build).
- [ ] Tests cover the new/changed functionality.
- [ ] No new linting or security warnings.
- [ ] Documentation updated if applicable.
- [ ] Commit messages are clear and descriptive.

## 🔗 Related Issues / Discussions

- Relates to #

## 🧪 How Has This Been Tested?

Describe the tests you ran to verify your changes.
